sector_alerts.title: SNAP/Medicaid cuts — 3.5M+ Americans lost food access; Medicaid work requirements advanced to Dec 2026

sector_alerts.title: Sahel/West Africa lean season peak — 52.8M at acute food insecurity Jun-Aug; famine risk in Somalia

sector_alerts.summary: IPC Phase 5 (catastrophic) in Borno/Nigeria: 15,000 people. Somalia: 6.5M at high hunger, UN confirmed famine risk in Barakaba. WFP underfunded: 28% of $215M Sahel target secured. 52.8M total at acute food insecurity. Lean season Jun-Aug peak now fully active.

SpaceX IPO (SPCX) launched Jun 12 at $135/share, ~$1.75T valuation — largest IPO in history. Three major US pension funds publicly challenged governance structure (Musk retains permanent near-unchecked control). xAI/SpaceX merger Feb 2026 absorbed $4.94B loss. Lawsuit filed 3 days before IPO is material safety-governance risk event for public investors. No response from SpaceX.

entity_reviews.name: xAI/Grok
entity_reviews.summary: ONGOING (Jun 9-17 2026): Devin Kim whistleblower suit filed Jun 9 2026 (California state court). Kim alleges he was fired Sep 2025 for raising safety concerns about Grok: racial bias, "MechaHitler" character, bioweapons information, information useful for weapons of mass destruction. Supervisor (xAI co-founder Jimmy Ba) fired Kim just before a planned safety presentation. Kim is now Center for AI Safety president. SpaceX co-defendant. US Commerce CAISI signed safety-testing agreement with xAI (May 2026). Neither xAI nor SpaceX has publicly responded to lawsuit as of Jun 17.
